issue_title: SystemHealthBar shows 1% success rate when all runs succeed
issue_body_preview:
## Bug

The System Health Bar displays "1% success rate" even when all recent runs succeeded (29/29 = 100%).

## Root Cause

`getRunMetrics()` returns `successRate` as a **0-1 ratio** (e.g. `1.0` for 100%), but `system-health.ts:getOperationsSignal()` passes this value through without converting to
test_description_zh: 打开应用首页，观察系统健康状态栏（System Health Bar）中的成功率显示。在所有最近运行均成功的情况下，查看成功率百分比数值是否正确。
expected_result_zh: 当所有最近运行均成功时（例如 29/29），系统健康状态栏应显示 '100% success rate'，而非 '1% success rate'。成功率数值应正确地将比率转换为百分比进行展示。
